page.title: Choose your plan
page.subtitle: Paid from day one — no free trial. Pick the plan that matches how many restaurants you run.

banner.success: 🎉 You're now on the {plan} plan. All features are unlocked.
banner.cancelled: No changes were made. You can upgrade any time.
banner.required: Welcome to CommandCenter — choose a plan below to unlock the dashboard, integrations and AI.
banner.pastDue: Your last payment didn't go through. Update billing below to restore access.
banner.trialEnded: Your legacy trial has ended. Choose a plan to restore access.
banner.trialDays: {days} days left on your legacy trial. Pick a plan to keep your data and integrations.
banner.paymentFailed: ⚠️ Your last payment failed. Please update your payment method to restore full access.

solo: Daily dashboard — revenue, labour & forecast vs actual
P&L tracker, budget, forecast, overheads & cash position
Recipe costing & menu margins (food cost %, gross profit)
Inventory, stock counts (by weight) & waste tracking
Prep lists, smart order lists & pre-orders
AI scheduling with Swedish labour-law compliance
Google review insights + AI reply drafts
Month-end Revisor close for your accountant
Ask CC AI assistant + downloadable reports — 30 queries/day
Email support · staff & manager logins (5 users)
group: Priority support (24h SLA) + quarterly review call
chain: Unlimited AI usage & unlimited team members
Concierge onboarding + custom Fortnox OAuth setup

booster.title: AI Booster
booster.trialBody: Add 100 extra AI queries per day on top of any paid plan. Pick a plan above first.
booster.paidBody: Add 100 extra AI queries per day on top of your plan. Cancel anytime.
